seo.title: AI Music Video Generator for Dreamy Fantasy MV Styles | OpenCreator
seo.description: Create dreamy fantasy music videos with AI. Generate storyboard-ready scenes, lyrical visuals, and cinematic MV clips from text prompts and references.

hero.title: Pure Sweet Girly Style MV
hero.description: Build dreamy, soft-aesthetic MVs without a full production team. Describe your concept and generate visual sequences, storyboard beats, and final clips ready for music release or social promotion.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Describe your MV concept and visual style

steps.title: Describe your MV concept
steps.description: Enter your creative vision—oriental fantasy with surreal 3D CG style, 30-second MV with 15+ shots featuring character-environment interactions, varying scales (giant or tiny), eye reflections, and visually striking compositions.

steps.title: Upload scene and character references
steps.description: Provide reference images of Chinese courtyards, gardens, and character styles. These guide the AI in maintaining visual consistency across all generated storyboard frames.

steps.title: AI generates storyboard script
steps.description: Gemini 3 Pro analyzes your references and concept to create a detailed shot-by-shot storyboard script with camera movements, compositions, and visual effects for maximum emotional impact.

steps.title: Generate surreal storyboard frames
steps.description: Nano Banana Pro renders 16+ storyboard frames in oriental fantasy + surreal 3D CG style—bizarre, beautiful colors, visual art, and striking compositions with varied perspectives.

steps.title: Produce animated MV clips
steps.description: Sora 2 transforms your storyboards into 12-second animated video clips, bringing the ethereal scenes to life with smooth motion and cinematic quality.

items.question: What is the Pure Sweet Girly Style MV workflow?
items.answer: This workflow creates oriental fantasy music videos with surreal 3D CG aesthetics. It generates storyboard scripts, renders multiple frames with consistent style, and produces animated video clips using Gemini 3 Pro, Nano Banana Pro, and Sora 2.

items.question: What AI models power this workflow?
items.answer: The workflow uses Gemini 3 Pro for script and storyboard generation, Nano Banana Pro for rendering fantasy storyboard frames, and Sora 2 for creating animated video clips with smooth motion.

items.question: What input do I need to start?
items.answer: You need a text description of your MV concept (theme, shot count, visual style) and reference images for scenes and characters. The AI generates the script, storyboards, and video automatically.

items.question: What visual style can I achieve?
items.answer: The workflow specializes in oriental fantasy + surreal 3D CG aesthetics—bizarre, beautiful, visually striking images with Chinese gardens, ethereal characters, eye reflections, scale variations, and dreamlike compositions.

items.question: How many shots can I generate?
items.answer: The workflow is designed for 15+ shots to create a 30-second MV. You can request more shots for longer videos, with each frame maintaining visual consistency.

items.question: Can I customize the character style?
items.answer: Yes. Provide character reference images and style descriptions to guide the AI. Characters will be rendered consistently across all storyboard frames and video clips.

items.question: What video duration is supported?
items.answer: Sora 2 generates 12-second animated clips per scene. Multiple clips can be assembled to create your complete MV at your desired length.

items.question: How are credits calculated?
items.answer: Credits are consumed based on script generation, storyboard frame rendering with Nano Banana Pro, and video production with Sora 2. More shots and higher resolution use more credits.
